scripts.build: npm run typecheck && esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node25 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs --minify && npm run copy-data
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build && npx tsx deploy.ts
scripts.copy-data: mkdir -p dist/data && cp -f inference/data/models.json inference/data/models_extended.json dist/data/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Note: Some data files not found'
scripts.metrics: tsx metrics/cli.ts && tsx metrics/cli.ts snapshot && tsx metrics/cli.ts backfill && tsx metrics/cli.ts watch && tsx scripts/check.ts
